name: HexVibe MCP Security Server
description: HexVibe v1.0 — Cognitive AppSec Guardrail: MCP server with HexVibe Core (1000 security patterns), Semgrep, TruffleHog, and cognitive scoring.

tools.name: list_skills
tools.purpose: List available security skills, triggers, and tool hints.

tools.name: get_skill_context
tools.purpose: Return index and patterns for selected skill for focused RAG/prompt context.

tools.name: ask_hexvibe
tools.purpose: Semantic search over HexVibe Core and return top 3 relevant Safe-Patterns with testbed examples.

tools.name: run_check
tools.purpose: Run Semgrep static analysis, conditional Syft license checks, and TruffleHog secret scanning.

tools.name: ignore_finding
tools.purpose: Persist an accepted false-positive by metric ID + file path + line fingerprint.

tools.name: apply_remediation
tools.purpose: Apply Safe-Fix for a metric and file path using the corresponding Safe-Pattern.
